Name: Basic Attack
Description:
Range: 3
Target: One enemy
Effect: Roll an attack using your highest Combat Art modifier  
Success: Deal **2 Fatigue**

Name: Dash
Description: Effect: Move a number of spaces up to your speed

Name: Recover
Description:
Target: Self
Effect: Reduce current **Fatigue** or **Stress** by 1 or end one **Status**

Name: Resuscitate
Description:
Range: 1
Target: One ally who is **Incapacitated**
Effect: The target is no longer **Incapacitated**, their **Fatigue** and
**Stress** are halved (round down), and they clear any negative **statuses**

Name: Assist
Description:
Range: 1
Trigger: An Ally targets an Enemy within range
Effect: You may impose **+1 Bane** on the Enemy's defensive roll.
If you do, end this stance.

Name: Protect
Description:
Range: 1
Trigger: An Ally within range is targeted by an enemy
Effect: You may grant the Ally +1 Boon on their Defensive roll.
If you do, end this stance.
